issues.title: P2 enforcement 0142b deferred but phase still claims ownership
issues.resolution: P2 split into P2a (additive+seed) in-phase vs P2b (enforcement) deploy-gated in P12 DEPLOY.md step 5. Phase Contracts section added to plan.

issues.title: P5 services forward-depend on P7 idempotency table
issues.resolution: P5 idempotency-agnostic contract locked: IdempotencyStore interface optional/nullable; decorator wiring in P7. Unit tests run without 0146.

issues.title: P5 scheduler depends on P8 lease storage
issues.resolution: P5 takes leaseEpoch int64 + LeaseAsserter interface opaque. Concrete storage-backed asserter provided in P8. No cross-package import from P5→jobs/lease.

action_taken: Phase Contracts section added to plan header defining P2a/P2b split, P5 idempotency-agnostic, P5 lease-epoch opaque. Round 2 skipped — findings enumerable and locally patchable.
